hero.title: Hi, I'm {name}
hero.subtitle: I build websites for businesses and individuals - just bring an idea, we'll handle everything else.
hero.description: Professional or creative design, all the features you need - just tell me what you want.
hero.body: I design and build fast, beautiful websites for local businesses - from landing pages to full storefronts. Ready in days, not months.

about.title: Who I am
about.p1: I design and build websites — for personal presence, business growth, or whatever you're building.

capabilities.title: Online Shop
capabilities.desc: Product listings, cart, and checkout - ready to take orders from day one.

capabilities.title: Booking System
capabilities.desc: Let customers pick a date and time without back-and-forth messages.

capabilities.title: Google Optimized
capabilities.desc: Built clean so search engines can find and rank your site.

capabilities.title: Manage Your Content
capabilities.desc: Update text, images, and products yourself - no developer needed.

capabilities.title: Mobile First
capabilities.desc: Looks sharp on every screen, from phone to desktop.

capabilities.title: Custom Design
capabilities.desc: No templates. Built around your brand, your colors, your feel.

capabilities.title: Multilingual
capabilities.desc: Reach more customers by serving them in their own language.

capabilities.title: Photo Gallery
capabilities.desc: Showcase your work, menu, or products with a fast image gallery.

items.description: Premium wedding & greeting card shop — 3D card viewer, custom orders via Zalo.
Minimalist specialty drinks shop — premium drink menu and online ordering.
Premium men's barbershop — online booking, barber profiles, and style gallery.

steps.title: Consult
steps.desc: Tell me about your business. I'll map out exactly what you need.

steps.title: Build
steps.desc: I design and develop your site. You review and approve each step.

steps.title: Launch
steps.desc: Your site goes live. I handle hosting, domain, and setup.

pricingCalc.heading: Estimate your project
pricingCalc.subtext: Adjust the slider and tick what you need - prices update instantly.
pricingCalc.monthly_hint: Select a monthly service to see recurring cost

addons.reviews_sub: Monitor & respond to Google / FB reviews

approach.body: I don't just build websites - I engineer brand-aligned digital experiences that prioritize speed, conversion, and editorial precision. Every project is a bespoke challenge.

features.title: Performance First
features.desc: Lightweight codebases designed to load instantly and rank above competitors in every SEO metric.

features.title: Editorial Precision
features.desc: Pixel-perfect attention to typography, spacing, and rhythm to ensure your brand's voice is heard clearly.
